title: Parameters for FRNet node
$comment: This schema is not considered in CI workflow. See https://github.com/autowarefoundation/autoware_universe/pull/8205#issuecomment-2255074224.

reference_frame.description: TF frame for ego crop box bounds (e.g. base_link).

min_x.description: Min X bound of crop box in reference frame.

min_y.description: Min Y bound of crop box in reference frame.

min_z.description: Min Z bound of crop box in reference frame.

max_x.description: Max X bound of crop box in reference frame.

max_y.description: Max Y bound of crop box in reference frame.

max_z.description: Max Z bound of crop box in reference frame.

class_probability_threshold.description: If any of the filter classes has probability >= this value, the point is excluded from the filtered output cloud.

classes.description: Class names to filter out when their probability exceeds the threshold.

output_format.description: Filtered output point format. Empty string preserves the input format.
